case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. DANIEL LYNCH et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT LYNCH, DANIEL DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LYNCH, DANIEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 242 TURK ST. #709, S.F. CA. 94102, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
